products.name: OG BEAR BASIC HOODIE — NEGRO
products.alt: Grizzly OG Bear Basic Negro Hoodie
products.desc: El polerón OG Bear de Grizzly en negro. Oso OG serigrafía frontal, capucha doble capa, bolsillo canguro. 80% algodón 20% poliéster. Tallas S · M · L · XL · XXL.

products.name: FLEECE HOODIE FW24 — BLACK
products.alt: Fear of God Essentials Fleece Hoodie FW24 Black
products.desc: Polerón Fear of God Essentials FW24. Fleece pesado, capucha oversized, interior afelpado premium. Logo impreso al pecho. Stock limitado: tallas M · L · XL.

products.name: FLEECE HOODIE FW24 — GREY
products.alt: Fear of God Essentials Fleece Hoodie FW24 Grey
products.desc: Polerón Fear of God Essentials FW24 en gris jaspeado. Fleece pesado, corte relaxed, capucha estructurada. Logo impreso al pecho. Stock limitado: tallas L · XL.

products.name: DARK OATMEAL HOODIE
products.alt: Fear of God Essentials Dark Oatmeal
products.desc: Polerón Fear of God Essentials en dark oatmeal. Tono tierra oscuro, corte oversize, interior afelpado premium. Stock limitado: tallas L · XL.

products.name: LIGHT OATMEAL HOODIE
products.alt: Fear of God Essentials Light Oatmeal
products.desc: Polerón Fear of God Essentials en light oatmeal. Beige neutro premium, corte oversize, logo bordado. Stock limitado: tallas L · XL.

products.name: STRETCH LIMO HOODIE
products.alt: Fear of God Essentials Stretch Limo
products.desc: Polerón Fear of God Essentials "Stretch Limo". Gris carbón profundo, silueta oversized, capucha de gran volumen. Stock limitado: tallas L · XL.
